files.description: Architectural guidelines (SRP, DIP, SoC, ADP, etc.), coding patterns (decorators, ControlMessage flow), testing standards, and DCO/licensing requirements. This is the primary reference for how code should be structured.
PR checklist: contributing guidelines, test coverage, documentation, docker-compose/Helm parity.
Enforced pre-commit hooks: Black (120 char), Flake8 (120 char), trailing whitespace, large file checks, AST validation, debug statement detection, and deployment config validation.
Extended Flake8 configuration with per-file ignores, isort settings, and coding style rules that complement pre-commit.
Code ownership: nv-ingest-maintainers and nemo-retriever-research own everything; specialized teams for docs, examples, devops, and CI.
Core nv-ingest service dependencies and build configuration. Reference for allowed dependency versions and the package's external interface.
NeMo Retriever library dependencies, uv source configuration for inter-package editable installs, and entry points. Shows the dependency wiring between packages.
Shared API package dependencies. This is the lowest-level package; its dependencies constrain the entire monorepo.
Client library dependencies. Must remain lightweight since external users install this package independently.
Schema-enforced metadata format for extracted content. Critical reference for understanding the data contract between pipeline stages.
Guide for adding new pipeline stages. Defines the expected patterns and contracts for stage implementations.
High-level architecture overview of the ingestion pipeline, scaling modes, and system design.
PR CI pipeline: pre-commit checks, Docker build and test (pytest, not integration, with coverage). Changes to CI should be reviewed for correctness and security.
